capacity_evidence.target_mesh: logical 1x4 ring over the four-chip physical cycle
capacity_evidence.device_allocator_probe: ttnn.get_memory_view: 8 DRAM banks * 4272341376 bytes per bank on each target Blackhole
capacity_evidence.prefill_chunking_contract: Internal starts are tile-aligned, but the final chunk preserves any positive logical tail; the public prefill sequence need not be tile- or page-aligned.
capacity_evidence.peak_live_activation_lifetime_proof: Conservative maximum of five full [1,1,131072,8192] BF16 equivalents: the residual/attention boundary, normalized or projection output, retained completed MLP chunks, final concatenation allocation, and output/residual allocation. Per-chunk packed gate/up and SwiGLU temporaries are bounded by 4096 tokens and deallocated after their last enqueued consumer; attention Q/K/V and projection partials are likewise explicitly released. This is a maximum concurrent lifetime bound, not a sum of all graph outputs.
capacity_evidence.ccl_reserve_contract: Conservative full-stack reserve covering persistent L1 decode RS intermediate/scatter/gather buffers plus mesh CCL bookkeeping; decode uses two BF16 RS+AG pairs per layer, two links, ring topology, 10 chunks per sync, two workers per link, and two buffers per channel.
capacity_evidence.formula: Persistent: TP4 BFP4 decoder weights plus TP4 embedding/LM-head reserve plus 80-layer BF16 KV at 2 local heads. Peak explicit activation: 5 * (1 batch * 131072 positions * 8192 hidden * 2 BF16 bytes), including all retained 4096-token MLP chunk outputs plus concat allocation. Additional reserves: 128 MiB shared constants/metadata, 100000000-byte trace region, one H/4 reduce-scatter temporary, and 1 GiB allocator/fragmentation. Intermediate TTNN buffers are explicitly deallocated after their final enqueued consumer.
capacity_evidence.validated_full_context_local_cache_shape: K and V each [2048,2,64,128] per device
capacity_evidence.stacked_decoder_boundary: Replicated [1,B,S,8192] BF16; validated by feeding one real TP4 layer output directly into a second invocation with independent layer-local K/V caches.
capacity_evidence.stage_scope: The selected flat TP4 layout restores the complete 131072-token HF context at batch 1. The one-layer stage validates full-size local cache allocation and shape; an 80-layer construction is deliberately deferred to full-model. Shared RoPE constants and a single prefill/decode weight copy prevent per-layer duplication. Larger batches trade batch for context and do not reduce the advertised batch-1 capability.

notes: The multichip decoder preserves arbitrary logical sequence lengths and advertises the model's full 131072-token context at batch 1. Correctness uses chunked nonaligned sequence length 39 with a seven-token final MLP chunk, advancing positions 39 and 40, position 64, refreshable nonidentity page tables, and paged caches. The source capture's batch-32/length-18 shape remains provenance rather than a public limit.

ir_provenance.translation_mesh: 1x1 functional and optimized baseline; 1x4 selected multichip ring
ir_provenance.collective_collapse: The captured 2x2 mapping was implemented first. The selected logical 1x4 TP4 ring keeps QKV/gate/up column parallel and output/down row parallel, reducing decode to two full-mesh all-reduces.

dtype_policy.functional_baseline: bf16 weights and activations; TILE layout; DRAM memory by default
dtype_policy.emitted_weights: BF8 for most projection weights and BF4 for gate/up projection weights
dtype_policy.multichip: BFP4/LoFi projection weights, BF16 activations/norms/collectives/cache, matching the optimized single-chip baseline precision policy
dtype_policy.deferred: A later datatype sweep may choose a lower cache or collective precision; it is not required for advertised-context feasibility.
